# NodeActivation.Evaluate method

Evaluate the activation against the consumer-computed set of currently-true facts: the layer draws iff every fact in [`AllOf`](./AllOf.md) is present (and none is Never).

```csharp
public bool Evaluate(IReadOnlySet<NodeFact> trueFacts)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| trueFacts | The facts the consumer has computed as true for the node being drawn. |
